title: × festulolium braunii
intro: × Festulolium braunii is a hybrid of ryegrass and fescue grass, bred specifically for its improved durability and disease resistance. This perennial grass has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of × festulolium braunii include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. The plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it can be consumed as a medicinal preparation.
